summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ViralIQ iteration 2. Backend APIs fully functional (95% success rate), frontend working correctly with all new features. Key improvements: viral_score validation FIXED, subscription cancellation flow implemented, email notifications working, usage limits properly enforced.

User signin with existing credentials works
Generate ideas endpoint works and returns 10 ideas with valid viral_score (float) - FIXED
Usage limits: free user blocked after 3 generations - WORKING CORRECTLY
Stripe checkout session creation for Pro and Agency plans
Cancellation email notification logged in DB
Frontend: Pricing page shows all 3 plans correctly
Frontend: Cancel subscription link appears for paid users (tested via simulation)
Frontend: Cancel confirmation dialog with Keep Plan / Yes Cancel buttons
Frontend: Logged in navigation shows Generator, Analyzer, Pricing links and subscription tier badge
Frontend: Generator page loads with all form elements
Frontend: Analyzer page loads with all form elements
Frontend: Usage limits properly enforced in UI
